evals.name: add-insight
evals.prompt: /pace-learn add 数据库迁移前一定要先备份，这次差点丢数据
evals.expected_output: Records new insight to insights.md with confidence score, tags, and source context.

evals.name: search-knowledge
evals.expected_output: Searches insights.md for '认证' related entries, returns matching insights with relevance.

assertions.text: Returns matching entries ranked by relevance

evals.name: auto-invoke-after-merge
evals.prompt: CR-005 已合并，总结一下经验
evals.expected_output: Auto-invoked after merge, extracts lessons learned from CR development history, updates insights.md.

assertions.text: Extracts lessons from CR development events

evals.name: list-all-insights
evals.expected_output: Lists all insights grouped by category/tag with confidence levels.

evals.name: empty-knowledge-base
evals.expected_output: Shows guidance and available subcommands when no specific action given.

assertions.text: Does not create files without explicit action

evals.name: prune-low-confidence
evals.expected_output: Executes decay scan first, then identifies cleanup candidates (Archived, Dormant+zero-verification, low-confidence Active). Lists candidates in table format and waits for user confirmation before removing.

assertions.text: Reads insights.md and executes decay scan on all Active entries first
Identifies cleanup candidates matching criteria (Archived, Dormant+confidence=0.2+verification=0, Active+confidence<=0.3+360d)
Outputs candidate table with title, type, confidence, verification count, last referenced, and reason
Waits for user confirmation before executing cleanup
Archived entries deleted from file; other candidates moved to Archived section
